prompt: Evaluate the described field condition and return the appropriate decision with supporting observations.
scenario: Pre-task photos for Housekeeping & general hazard recognition show the exposure area set up with the planned guards, access control, and crew protection in place. The daily briefing form is signed and no active exposure is visible. Reference material on hand: OSHA general duty, 1926 Subpart L (scaffolds).
title: Hazard check: Housekeeping & general hazard recognition (industrial site)
